articles.title: Rhode Island couple unexpectedly become parents while on vacation in Florida
articles.description:
The couple was preparing to set sail on a cruise when they got the surprise of a lifetime: they were going to be parents.

The post Rhode Island couple unexpectedly become parents while on vacation in Florida appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rhode Island couple unexpectedly became parents while vacationing in Florida.
They were preparing to set sail on a cruise when they received the news.
This event highlights the unpredictability of travel and family planning for Boston residents.

articles.title: Juvenile humpback whale washes ashore in Winthrop
articles.description:
An investigation is underway into the death of the young whale, which was discovered lodged under a private dock on Wednesday.

The post Juvenile humpback whale washes ashore in Winthrop appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Juvenile humpback whale found dead under a dock in Winthrop on Wednesday.
Investigation launched to determine the cause of death for the young whale.
Residents urged to report any stranded marine life to local authorities.

articles.title: Taylor Farms recalls lettuce shipped to 27 states, including Mass. and NH, over cyclospora risk
articles.description:
The Taylor Farms recall announcement listed 25 shredded lettuce and salad mix products sold under eight different brand codes.

The post Taylor Farms recalls lettuce shipped to 27 states, including Mass. and NH, over cyclospora risk appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Taylor Farms recalls 25 lettuce products due to cyclospora contamination risk.
Affected products shipped to 27 states, including Massachusetts and New Hampshire.
Boston residents should check for recalled items to avoid potential health risks.

articles.title: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, US Marshals Service tells AP
articles.description:
The pending charges in the United Kingdom accused the brothers of abusing women in an area north of London, where they grew up.

The post Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, US Marshals Service tells AP appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami by US Marshals on July 19.
Brothers face charges related to abuse of women in the UK.
Local residents may see increased scrutiny on social media influencers.
